song_name: Lewis Capaldi - Someone You Loved - Before You Go
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
I fell by the wayside like everyone else[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
I hate you, I hate you, I hate you, but I was just kidding myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
Our every moment, I start to replace[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#sus4[/ch]
'Cause now that they're gone, all I hear are the words that I needed to say[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
When you hurt under the surface[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Like troubled water running cold[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]G#sus4[/ch]
Well, time can heal, but this won't[/tab]

[Chorus 1]

[tab]                [ch]C#[/ch]
Now the day bleeds[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G#[/ch]
Into nightfall[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]A#m[/ch]
And you're not here[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]F#[/ch]
To get me through it all[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C#[/ch]
I let my guard down[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G#[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A#m[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]

[Chorus End]

[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                [ch]C#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]

[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                         [ch]G#[/ch]                              [ch]A#m[/ch]  [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm going under and this time I fear there's no one to turn to[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]                         [ch]G#[/ch]                             [ch]A#m[/ch]   [ch]F#[/ch]
This all or nothing way of loving got me sleeping without you[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]C#[/ch]
Now, I need somebody to know[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G#[/ch]
Somebody to heal[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]A#m[/ch]
Somebody to have[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F#[/ch]
Just to know how it feels[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C#[/ch]                          [ch]G#[/ch]
It's easy to say but it's never the same[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]A#m[/ch]                         [ch]F#[/ch]
I guess I kinda liked the way you helped me escape[/tab]

[Pre Chorus]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]
When you hurt under the surface[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]                             [ch]F#[/ch]
Like troubled water running cold[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]G#[/ch]
Well, some can heal, but this won't[/tab]

[Chorus 2]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]              [ch]G#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A#m[/ch]
Was there something I could've said to make your heart beat better?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#[/ch]
If only I'd have known you had a storm to weather[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]              [ch]G#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A#m[/ch]
Was there something I could've said to make it all stop hurting?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#[/ch]
It kills me how your mind can make you feel so worthless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]

[Bridge]

[tab]      [ch]A#m[/ch]               [ch]G#[/ch]                        [ch]C#[/ch]
And I tend to close my eyes when it hurts sometimes[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F#[/ch]           [ch]A#m[/ch]
I fall into your arms[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]                      [ch]F#[/ch]
I'll be safe in your sound 'til I come back around[/tab]

[Chorus 3]

[tab][ch]C#[/ch]              [ch]G#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A#m[/ch]
Was there something I could've said to make your heart beat better?[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]F#[/ch]
If only I'd have known you had a storm to weather[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#[/ch]              [ch]G#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A#m[/ch]
Was there something I could've said to make it all stop hurting?[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F#[/ch]
It kills me how your mind can make you feel so worthless[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]
So, before you go[/tab]

[Ending]
[tab]                [ch]C#[/ch]
I let my guard down[/tab]
[tab]                          [ch]G#[/ch]
And then you pulled the rug[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A#m[/ch]                      [ch]F#[/ch]
I was getting kinda used to being someone you loved[/tab]
